---
name: Task
about: Structured task for feature, bug, or technical work
title: "[TASK] "
labels: ["task"]
assignees: []
---

## Objective
<!-- What outcome are we trying to achieve? -->

## Context
<!-- Why this matters now; link to related issues/decisions -->

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Implementation Notes
<!-- Expected files/modules touched -->
- `src/...`
- `public/...`
- `test/...`

## Test Plan
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Manual verification steps documented
- [ ] Regression risks noted

## Deliverables
- [ ] Code changes
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs updated (`README.md` / `AGENTS.md` / `DECISIONS.md` as needed)

## Agent Execution Contract (if delegated)
Agent must report:
1. What changed
2. Tests run + output
3. Risks / follow-ups
4. Suggested next issue
